---
title: "James H. Conigrave's resume"
author: James H. Conigrave
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pagedown::html_resume:
    self_contained: true
    css: ["style-rules.css", "resume"]
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.pagedjs_page:not(:first-of-type) {
  --sidebar-width: 7.90rem;
  --sidebar-background-color: #ffffff;
  --main-width: calc(var(--content-width) - var(--sidebar-width));
  --decorator-horizontal-margin: 0.2in;
}
```

```{r data-load, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE, include = FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
id <- "m0d4TKcAAAAJ"
pubs <- publications()

pre_print_journals <- c("*OSF*", "*PsyArXiv*")

pre_prints <- pubs[pubs$journal %in% pre_print_journals, ]
pubs <- pubs[!pubs$journal %in% pre_print_journals, ]
pubs.number <- nrow(pubs)
# Get grant funding
grnt <- data.table::fread(system.file("db/grants.csv", package = "conig")) |>
  dplyr::arrange(desc(year))
total_grant_funding <- paste0("$", round(sum(grnt$amount) / 1e6, 1), "M")
# get top n pubs
if (is.finite(n_pubs)) {
  pubs$first_author <- unlist(lapply(pubs$author, function(x) {
    strsplit(x, split = ",")[[1]][1]
  }))
  pubs$is_me <- grepl("JH Conigrave", pubs$first_author)
  cites_per_year <- pubs$cites / (lubridate::year(Sys.Date()) - pubs$year + 1)

  pubs <- pubs[order(cites_per_year, pubs$is_me, decreasing = TRUE), ][
    1:n_pubs,
  ]
  pubs <- pubs[order(pubs$author_last), ]
  pubs <- pubs[order(pubs$year, decreasing = TRUE), ]
}
pattern <- "### {author} ({year}). {title}. {journal}, {number}. {doi}

{extra_info}

N/A

{year}


"

fix_grammar <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("(?<!\\.)\\.\\.(?!\\.)", "\\.", x, perl = T)
  x <- gsub("\\?\\.", "\\?", x)
  x <- gsub(r"(\,\s\.)", ".", x)
  x
}

section_attributes <- function(...) {
  values <- list(...)
  values <- values[!vapply(values, is.null, logical(1))]
  values <- values[!vapply(values, function(x) identical(x, FALSE), logical(1))]

  attrs <- mapply(
    function(name, value) {
      name <- gsub("_", "-", name)
      if (isTRUE(value)) {
        return(glue::glue("{name}=true"))
      }
      glue::glue('{name}="{value}"')
    },
    names(values),
    values,
    USE.NAMES = FALSE
  )

  paste(attrs, collapse = " ")
}

section_heading <- function(
  title,
  icon,
  concise = FALSE,
  alt_group = NULL,
  alt_group_title = NULL,
  alt_group_icon = NULL
) {
  attrs <- section_attributes(
    data_icon = icon,
    data_concise = concise,
    data_alt_group = alt_group,
    data_alt_group_title = alt_group_title,
    data_alt_group_icon = alt_group_icon
  )

  glue::glue(
    "{title} {{{attrs}}}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

"
  )
}

year_range <- function(start, end) {
  paste(unique(na.omit(c(end, start))), collapse = " - ")
}

format_citation_person <- function(person) {
  given <- person$given
  initials <- paste0(gsub("\\.", "", substring(given, 1, 1)), collapse = "")
  paste(initials, person$family)
}

format_citation_authors <- function(authors) {
  formatted <- vapply(authors, format_citation_person, character(1))
  standardise_authors(paste(formatted, collapse = ", "))
}

package_citation_entry <- function(package, fallback) {
  tryCatch(utils::citation(package)[[1]], error = function(e) fallback)
}

# regex interpretation. Match two dots and replace with one, if there's not an extra dot before, or after the two (three dots in a row).

publications <- fix_grammar(glue::glue(pattern, .envir = as.environment(pubs)))
pre_prints <- fix_grammar(glue::glue(
  pattern,
  .envir = as.environment(pre_prints)
))

comm <- data.table::fread(
  system.file("db/commentaries.csv", package = "conig"),
  encoding = "Latin-1"
)

comm$extra_info <- "N/A"
comm$number <- ""
comm$doi <- ""
comm$journal <- ifelse(
  nchar(comm$journal) > 0,
  paste0("*", comm$journal, "*"),
  comm$journal
)

commentaries_other <- glue::glue(pattern, .envir = as.environment(comm)) |>
  fix_grammar()

total_citations <- scholar::get_profile(id)$total_cites |>
  format(big.mark = ",")

h_index <- tryCatch(scholar::predict_h_index(id)[1, 2], error = function(x) {
  NULL
})

CRAN_downloads <- cranlogs::cran_downloads(
  packages = c("corx", "Conigrave", "revise"),
  from = "2015-01-01",
  to = lubridate::today()
) |>
  dplyr::group_by(package) |>
  dplyr::summarise(dls = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE))
total_cran_downloads <- sum(CRAN_downloads$dls) |>
  format(big.mark = ",")
```

# Aside

<!-- ![James](james_smaller.png){width=100%} -->

## Contact {#contact}

- <i class="fa fa-globe-asia"></i> [conigrave.com](https://conigrave.com)
- <i class="fa fa-leaf"></i> [scopus profile](https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=57207914919)
- <i class="fa fa-google"></i> [google scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=m0d4TKcAAAAJ&hl=en)
- <i class="fa fa-github"></i> [github.com/conig](https://github.com/conig)

## Focus {#skills}

Research: motivation, behaviour change, substance use, Indigenous health, public health

Analysis: biostatistics, reproducible workflows, dashboards, data linkage

Programming: R, Julia, Python, Lua

Writing: manuscripts, grants, reports, technical documentation

## Metrics {#metrics}

Funding: `r total_grant_funding`

Publications: `r pubs.number`

Citations: `r total_citations`

CRAN downloads: `r total_cran_downloads`

```{r echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
if (!is.null(h_index)) {
  cat("h-index: ", h_index, "\n")
}
```

## Document {#docinfo}

Built with [pagedown](https://github.com/rstudio/pagedown) in R. Google Scholar data retrieved with [scholar](https://github.com/jkeirstead/scholar). Source: [GitHub](https://github.com/conig/jamesconigrave/).

This document updates daily: [conigrave.com/resume](https://conigrave.com/resume).

Updated: `r format(Sys.time(), format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")` AEDT

# Main

## JAMES H. CONIGRAVE {#title}

### **Motivation, substance use, and public health**

## Profile {data-icon=user}

```{r echo=FALSE, results = "asis"}
cat(conig::bio())
```

```{r echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
if (experience > 0) {
  exp <- data.table::fread(system.file("db/experience.csv", package = "conig"))
  is_present <- exp$end == "Present"
  exp$end[is_present] <- lubridate::year(Sys.Date())
  exp <- suppressWarnings(exp[order(-as.numeric(exp$end)), ])
  exp$end[is_present] <- "Present"
  if (is.numeric(experience)) {
    exp <- exp[exp$priority == "Yes", ]
    exp <- exp[1:experience, ]
  }

  exp$exp_year_range <- sapply(1:nrow(exp), function(i) {
    year_range(exp$start[i], exp$end[i])
  })
  exp_header <- section_heading(
    "Academic appointments",
    "laptop",
    alt_group = "career",
    alt_group_title = "Career",
    alt_group_icon = "laptop"
  )
  exp_content <- glue::glue_data(
    exp,
    "
### **{title}**

{org}

{location}

{exp_year_range}


"
  ) |>
    paste(collapse = "\n\n")
  exp_content <- paste0(exp_header, "\n", exp_content)
  cat(exp_content)
  cat("\n\n")
}

# add professional experience

professional_content <- paste0(
  section_heading(
    "Earlier professional roles",
    "suitcase",
    concise = TRUE,
    alt_group = "career",
    alt_group_title = "Career",
    alt_group_icon = "laptop"
  ),
  r"(

### **Health Promotion Officer**

Sydney North Shore and Beaches Medicare Local

North Sydney, NSW

2014

<!-- Managed GPs in school program -->

### **Mental Health Coordinator**

Sydney North Shore and Beaches Medicare Local

Frenchs Forest, NSW

2014 - 2013)"
)

if (!professional) {
  professional_content <- gsub(".*", "", professional_content)
}

cat(professional_content)
cat("\n\n")
```

```{r echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}

if (education > 0) {
  edu_data <- data.table::fread(system.file(
    "db/education.csv",
    package = "conig"
  ))
  edu_data <- edu_data[order(-edu_data$end), ]

  if (is.numeric(education)) {
    edu_data <- edu_data[edu_data$priority == "Yes", ][1:education, ]
  }

  edu_data$edu_range <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(edu_data)), function(i) {
    year_range(edu_data$start[i], edu_data$end[i])
  })

  edu_content_header <- section_heading(
    "Education",
    "graduation-cap",
    concise = TRUE
  )
  edu_content <- glue::glue_data(
    edu_data,
    "

### **{qual}**

{institution}

{location}

{edu_range}


"
  )
  cat(edu_content_header)
  cat("\n\n")
  cat(edu_content)
}
```

```{r echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
cat(section_heading(
  "Awards",
  "award",
  concise = TRUE,
  alt_group = "recognition-funding",
  alt_group_title = "Recognition and funding",
  alt_group_icon = "award"
))
```

### **APSAD Mentor Award**

Australasian Professional Society on Alcohol and other Drugs (APSAD)

N/A

2025

--- Awarded for sustained mentoring and support for career development in the alcohol, tobacco and other drugs field.

```{r echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}

content = r"(Workshops {data-icon=chalkboard-teacher}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### **Introductory statistics**

Centre of Research Excellence: Indigenous Health + Alcohol, <br/>The University of Sydney

Camperdown, Sydney

2018

### **Heart Rate Variability (HRV)**

Australian Catholic University

Strathfield, NSW

2016
)"

if (workshops) {
  cat(content)
}
```

```{r results = "asis", echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}

if (grants) {
  cat(
    section_heading(
      "Selected funding",
      "file-invoice-dollar",
      alt_group = "recognition-funding",
      alt_group_title = "Recognition and funding",
      alt_group_icon = "award"
    )
  )
  grnt <- grnt[grnt$amount >= 1e6, ]
  grnt$author <- standardise_authors(grnt$author)
  grnt$amount <- trimws(format(as.numeric(grnt$amount), big.mark = ","))

  grant_pattern = "### {author} ({year}). {title}. *{organisation}*

--- ${amount}

N/A

{year}


"

  glue::glue_data(grnt, grant_pattern)
}
```

```{r echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
students <- data.table::fread(system.file("db/students.csv", package = "conig"))
students$year_end[is.na(students$year_end)] <- "Present"
students <- students[order(-students$year_start), ]

content_header <- section_heading("Research supervision", "users")

content <- glue::glue_data(
  students,
  "

### **{name_first} {name_last}**

{type}

N/A

{year_end} - {year_start}

--- {role}

\n"
)

if (supervision) {
  cat(content_header)
  cat(content)
}
```

```{r echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
header = section_heading("Software", "keyboard")
revise_citation <- package_citation_entry(
  "revise",
  utils::bibentry(
    bibtype = "Manual",
    title = "revise: Dynamic Revision Letters for 'Rmarkdown' Manuscripts",
    author = c(
      utils::person("James", "Conigrave"),
      utils::person("Philip", "Parker"),
      utils::person("Taren", "Sanders"),
      utils::person("Michael", "Noetel"),
      utils::person(c("Caspar", "J."), "Van Lissa")
    ),
    year = "2026",
    url = "https://github.com/conig/revise"
  )
)
revise_authors <- format_citation_authors(revise_citation$author)

content = glue::glue(
  r"(

### [[revise_authors]] ([[revise_citation$year]]). [[revise_citation$title]]. *R package*. [[revise_citation$url]]

--- [[CRAN_downloads$dls[3] |> format(big.mark = ",")]] downloads

N/A

[[revise_citation$year]]


### <u>JH Conigrave</u> (2019). corx: Create and Format Correlation Matrices. *CRAN*. https://conigrave.com/corx

--- [[CRAN_downloads$dls[2] |> format(big.mark = ",")]] downloads

N/A

2019

### <u>JH Conigrave</u> (2017). Conigrave: Flexible Tools for Multiple Imputation. *CRAN*. https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=Conigrave

--- [[CRAN_downloads$dls[1] |> format(big.mark = ",")]] downloads

N/A

2017)",
  .open = "[[",
  .close = "]]"
)

if (packages) {
  cat(header)
  cat(content)
}
```

```{r results = "asis", echo = FALSE, message = FALSE }
if (n_pubs > 0) {
  if (is.finite(n_pubs)) {
    pub_head = "Selected publications"
  } else {
    pub_head = "Peer-reviewed publications"
  }

  cat(
    section_heading(
      pub_head,
      "file",
      alt_group = "research-outputs",
      alt_group_title = "Research outputs",
      alt_group_icon = "file"
    )
  )
  publications
}
```

```{r results = "asis", echo = FALSE, message = FALSE }
if (preprints) {
  cat(
    section_heading(
      "Preprints",
      "file",
      alt_group = "research-outputs",
      alt_group_title = "Research outputs",
      alt_group_icon = "file"
    )
  )

  pre_prints
}
```

```{r results = "asis", echo = FALSE, message = FALSE }
if (commentaries) {
  cat(
    section_heading(
      "Research translation",
      "quote-left",
      concise = TRUE,
      alt_group = "research-outputs",
      alt_group_title = "Research outputs",
      alt_group_icon = "file"
    )
  )

  commentaries_other
}
```

```{r results = "asis", echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
if (peer_review) {
  reviews <- data.table::fread(system.file(
    "db/peer review.csv",
    package = "conig"
  ))
  reviews <- reviews |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$Journal), nzchar(.data$Journal)) |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data$Journal) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      review_count = dplyr::n(),
      first_year = min(.data$Year, na.rm = TRUE),
      latest_year = max(.data$Year, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(
      dplyr::desc(.data$review_count),
      dplyr::desc(.data$latest_year),
      .data$Journal
    ) |>
    head(5)
  cat(
    section_heading(
      "Frequent peer review outlets",
      "user-friends",
      alt_group = "service",
      alt_group_title = "Service",
      alt_group_icon = "user-friends"
    )
  )
  reviews$review_label <- ifelse(
    reviews$review_count == 1,
    "1 review",
    paste(reviews$review_count, "reviews")
  )
  reviews$review_years <- mapply(
    year_range,
    reviews$first_year,
    reviews$latest_year
  )
  content <- glue::glue_data(
    reviews,
    "

### **{Journal}**

--- {review_label}

N/A

{review_years}

\n"
  )

  cat(content)
}
```

```{r echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
content = paste0(
  section_heading(
    "Committee membership",
    "comments",
    concise = TRUE,
    alt_group = "service",
    alt_group_title = "Service",
    alt_group_icon = "user-friends"
  ),
  "

### **Australasian Professional Society of Alcohol and Other Drugs (APSAD)**

Early-Mid Career Researchers Subcommittee

--- Elected Chair in 2020

N/A

2022 - 2019

"
)

if (committees) {
  cat(content)
}
```

```{r conf, results = "asis", echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}

if (conferences) {
  cat(
    section_heading("Presentations", "globe-asia")
  )

  conf <- data.table::fread(system.file(
    "db/conference.csv",
    package = "conig"
  )) |>
    dplyr::arrange(desc(year))
  conf$author = standardise_authors(conf$author)

  conf_pattern = "### {author} ({year}). {title}. *{conference}*

N/A

{location}

{year}


"

  fix_grammar(glue::glue_data(conf, conf_pattern))
}
```

<!-- Scholarships {data-icon=medal} -->
<!-- -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -->

<!-- ### Australian Postgraduate Award (APA) -->

<!-- Institute for Positive Psychology and Education, Australian Catholic University -->

<!-- N/A -->

<!-- 2018 -->

<!-- ### Mindfulness Compassion and Action -->

<!-- Institute for Positive Psychology and Education, Australian Catholic University -->

<!-- N/A -->

<!-- 2016 -->
